info.title: Aurora F&B API
info.description: Integrated F&B ERP for Torado Group (multi-brand, multi-outlet, single-tenant).

get.description:
Return all versions for selected scope/rule_type with overlap flags.
Mostly used by the configuration timeline page (non-approval rule types).

post.description:
Seed defaults. By default (no `rule_type` in payload), seeds approval_workflow.
Pass {"rule_type": "config"} to seed the 4 self-service config rule types.

get.description: List of self-service configuration rule types managed via /admin/configuration/* UI.

Master data list — readable by any authenticated user.
Outlet managers etc. need to see vendors, items, GL accounts, etc.
Master data detail — readable by any authenticated user.

post.description:
Extract structured fields from a receipt image (base64).

Body:
  {
    "image_base64": "<base64 string, NO data: prefix>",
    "mime_type":    "image/jpeg" | "image/png" | "image/webp"
  }

Returns parsed receipt dict (or {error: ...} on failure).
Non-blocking: caller should always allow manual override.

get.description: Return supported dims + metrics + comparatives. No special perm needed beyond auth.
